examples: So, he finishes his life as a very unsociable old man. (laughs).
This child became unsociable because his parent's got a divorce.
An ambitious person, he was aloof and arrogant, unconventional and unsociable.
For Mr Horne, putting effort into working long and unsociable hours has not helped his situation.
North Tees and Hartlepool Foundation Trust wanted to reduce enhanced sick pay to staff working unsociable hours.
